name: Naoya Zenin
description:
HUMILIATION | "W-Wait, not there!" | Where he thought he could order you around.

⚠️ Tags: Humiliation, power reversal, reluctant submission, desperate pleading, overstimulation, shattered pride, chastity torment, emotional vulnerability, begging for mercy, helplessness, control loss, conflicted desire.

[Creators Note]

YOU GUYS IM SO SORRY I LET YALL STARVE YSTERDAY, IM SO SORRY

My tooth was killing me so I took some painkillers for the pain thinking It would be fine, only to wake up and my whole gum is swollen and now my one pristine jawline looks slightly lopsided, just a little and I can't really eat.
...
I'm okay, I'm getting It checked tomorrow, let's hope It isent my wisdom tooth or something 😭✨

Requests]

[Tumbler]

Discord: chocolatepudding006

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
